title: Potion Icons
description: GUI only Icons for potions that make distinguishing them easier without removing the classic vanilla look!
body:
![All Potions and their Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75290f8dddbbf3dc3a5e44f440836b07c31f110f.png)
Adds GUI only small bottom right icons to potions, splash potions, lingering potions, tipped arrows, and ominous bottles. Helpful for distinguishing potions in a rush without sacrificing the classic vanilla feel.
